parameters.text:
=You are a competitive intelligence analyst for a workflow automation company. Below are articles published in the last {{ $json.windowDays }} days by competitors and industry sources.

Produce 3-5 key takeaways for a weekly digest.

RULES:
1. Every takeaway MUST be grounded in a specific article below. Do not introduce outside knowledge or speculate about industry trends not present in this data.
2. Prioritize competitively significant items: product launches, strategic positioning, pricing, partnerships, acquisitions, AI/agent capabilities, competitor comparisons. DEPROIORITIZE generic SEO content (app roundups, unrelated software reviews) unless it signals a strategic shift.
3. Note when a competitor is directly positioning against another company.
4. Be specific. "Zapier published about AI agents" is useless. "Zapier is pushing deterministic automation over agents to control token costs" is useful.
5. "sources_covered" must list ONLY sources that appear in your takeaways. Do not list a source you did not cite.
6. If a source published articles but NONE were competitively significant, include one brief takeaway noting what they published and that it was low-signal. Do not create low-signal takeaways for sources that already have a substantive takeaway.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching this schema. No markdown fences, no preamble:

{
  "headline": "one sentence summarizing the week's most important signal",
  "takeaways": [
    {
      "title": "short punchy title (max 10 words)",
      "insight": "2-3 sentences explaining what happened and why it matters competitively",
      "source": "the source name",
      "url": "the article URL"
    }
  ],
  "sources_covered": ["list of source names"]
}

ARTICLES:
{{ $json.combinedText }}
